unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Well, I think moss is one of the oldest plants.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 苔藓 (moss) 绿油油的，老板 (boss) 很喜欢。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I visited the redwood forests in California several times.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: red (红色的) + wood (木头) -> 红杉树。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The cheetah runs the fastest among all land animals.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 猎豹 (cheetah) 跑得太快了，老师 (teacher) 追不上它。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 折叠式的；可折叠的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's a folding fan.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: fold (折叠) + ing (形容词后缀) -> 折叠式的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's a folding fan. I bought it last year.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: folding (折叠的) + fan (扇子) -> 折扇。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Bamboo is one of the most popular subjects in Chinese paintings.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 大熊猫在竹林 (bamboo) 里洗头，用去屑洗发水 (shampoo)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yeah. Bamboo is one of the most popular subjects in Chinese paintings.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 是的 (yeah)，我们相识已经有一年 (year) 了。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 广受欢迎的；流行的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Bamboo is one of the most popular subjects in Chinese paintings.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 广受欢迎的 (popular) 歌手通常有定期 (regular) 的演出。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's a symbol of goodness in Chinese culture.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: good (好的) + ness (名词后缀) -> 美德，善良。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: People can use it to build houses and make tools and instruments.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 那个酷 (cool) 酷的工人手拿一柄新工具 (tool)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Exactly! Actually we eat bamboo shoots too.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: actual (实际的) + ly (副词后缀) -> 实际上。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 幼苗；嫩芽 v. 射击；开枪
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Actually we eat bamboo shoots too.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 别大声喊 (shout)，不然会吓跑森林里的幼苗 (shoot)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Why does bamboo often appear in Chinese paintings?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 苹果 (apple) 从树上出现 (appear) 掉下来。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Please feel free to ask me any questions you have.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: feel (感觉) + free (自由的) -> 可以随便做某事。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 陆地；土地 v. 降落；着陆
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The biggest land animal in the world is the African elephant.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 降落 (land) 在沙滩 (sand) 的土地上。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 非洲的；非洲人的 n. 非洲人
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The biggest land animal in the world is the African elephant.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词干法: Africa (非洲) + an (形容词后缀) -> 非洲的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Which do you think is the most beautiful, the rose, the peony, or the lotus flower?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 把玫瑰 (rose) 凑近鼻子 (nose) 闻闻香味。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Which do you think is the most beautiful, the rose, the peony, or the lotus flower?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 骑着小马 (pony) 去看娇艳的牡丹 (peony)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Which do you think is the most beautiful, the rose, the peony, or the lotus flower?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆: “乐透司” -> 坐在莲花 (lotus) 里中乐透。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Look at that butterfly! It has the most colourful wings.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: butter (黄油) + fly (飞) -> 飞舞的黄油像蝴蝶。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It has the most colourful wings.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 把戒指 (ring) 戴在鸟儿的翅膀 (wing) 上。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Which animal jumps the highest, the lion, the monkey, or the tree frog?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 大雾 (fog) 笼罩着池塘，青蛙 (frog) 在荷叶上跳跃。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some could stand up to three metres tall and weigh up to 860 kg.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: up (向上) + to (到) -> 接近；直到。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some could stand up to three metres tall and weigh up to 860 kg.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词干法: weigh (动词，称重) -> weight (名词，重量)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some could stand up to three metres tall and weigh up to 860 kg.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 首字母缩写: k (kilo, 千) + g (gram, 克) -> 千克。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The ginkgo tree is one of the oldest living trees on earth.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 银杏 (ginkgo) 树下吃芒果 (mango)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Many Chinese believe that the old ginkgo tree in the Zhongnan Mountains is the most beautiful tree.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 相信 (believe) 他能为我们解除 (relieve) 痛苦。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: the old ginkgo tree in the Zhongnan Mountains in Shaanxi Province
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 在这个省份 (province) 游说，说服 (convince) 了很多人。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: When autumn comes, one of the most popular activities is to take a walk under ginkgo trees.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: take (去进行) + a walk (走一步/散步) -> 散步。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: At this moment you realize people, plants, and animals are all connected.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: connect (连接) + ed -> 连接的，相关的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How are plants and animals connected with us?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: be (是) + connected (相关的) + with (与) -> 与……有关联。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We Can't Live Without Bees
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: with (和...一起) + out (在外面) -> 没有，缺乏。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Imagine you go to the supermarket in your area, but there are almost no fruits...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 想象 (imagine) 蒸汽引擎 (engine) 的运行方式。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Imagine you go to the supermarket, but there are almost no fruits, vegetables, honey...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 采蜂蜜 (honey) 去卖，换取了许多钱 (money)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How would you feel? Disappointed? Angry? Sad?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: dis (否定) + appoint (指定/承诺) + ed -> 承诺未兑现，感到失望的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We need each other to live, and bees are one of the best examples of this connection.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: connect (连接) + ion (名词后缀) -> 联系，连接。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Bees are very hard-working animals, and their greatest work is pollination.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: pollen (花粉) + ate + ion -> 授粉。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: As they fly from one flower to another, they take pollen with them.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆: “跑栏” -> 拿着花粉跑过护栏。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This action helps plants grow.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: act (做，行动) + ion (名词后缀) -> 行动。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In fact, without their work, about 80 per cent of the plants in the world cannot grow.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: in (在...里面) + fact (事实) -> 实际上。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 百分之 adj. & adv. 每一百中
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: about 80 per cent of the plants in the world cannot grow.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词干法: per (每) + cent (百) -> 每百中，百分之。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: For this reason, many scientists believe that bees are the most important animals on this planet.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: for (为了) + this (这个) + reason (原因) -> 出于这个原因。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: For this reason, many scientists believe that bees are the most important animals on this planet.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形似记忆: planet (行星) 比 plant (植物) 多一个字母e。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In order to store honey, they create honeycombs.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: in (在...) + order (秩序/顺序) + to -> 为了达到某种目的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: v. 贮存；存储 n. 百货商店；商店
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In order to store honey, they create honeycombs.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 商店 (store) 靠近海岸 (shore)，里边存储了许多物资。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In order to store honey, they create honeycombs.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: honey (蜂蜜) + comb (梳子，指类似梳状的网格结构) -> 蜂巢。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Another interesting thing about bees is how they communicate.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 在社区 (community) 里，大家需要友好交流 (communicate)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Bees play an important part in the ecosystem of our planet.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: play (扮演) + a part (角色/一部分) -> 参与；扮演角色。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Bees play an important part in the ecosystem of our planet.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: eco (生态) + system (系统) -> 生态系统。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Think about what you can do to protect one of the most amazing animals on earth.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 这个工程项目 (project) 需要大家的保护 (protect)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Make up a conversation about bamboo and its importance.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: important (重要的) + ce (名词后缀) -> 重要性。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Can you give another title for the text?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 那本小 (little) 书的书名标题 (title) 非常吸引人。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 人 adj. 人的；人类的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What do you know about the connection between humans and other insects?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 人类 (human) 往往具有幽默感 (humor)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: between humans and other insects, such as ants and butterflies
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 阿姨 (aunt) 看到地上有一只蚂蚁 (ant)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They are home to many birds.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: be (是) + home (家) + to (对...) -> 是……的家园。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Add the endings to form nouns: happiness...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: happy (快乐的，变y为i) + ness -> 快乐，幸福。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Add the endings: disappoint -> disappointed...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词干法: dis (否定) + appoint (指定/承诺) -> 没能履行承诺，令人失望。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: After the rain, some mushrooms appeared in the garden.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 卧室 (bedroom) 的墙角长出了一颗大蘑菇 (mushroom)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What did you put in your luggage? It weighs a ton.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 儿子 (son) 搬起了一吨 (ton) 重的石头。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You may not realize it, but frogs play an important role in our ecosystem.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 遵守规则 (rule) 才能扮演好你的角色 (role)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You may not realize it, but frogs play an important role in our ecosystem.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: play (扮演) + a role (角色) -> 扮演角色，发挥作用。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The smallest frogs are about the size of a pea...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 喝着绿茶 (tea) 吃着绿色的豌豆 (pea)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Because of this, they are popular subjects in studies on climate change and the ecosystem.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 同班同学 (classmate) 们在一起讨论气候 (climate) 变化。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Blue whales live in all oceans except the Arctic Ocean.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 我们要保持蔚蓝色海洋 (ocean) 的干净 (clean)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Blue whales live in all oceans except the Arctic Ocean.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 除了 (except) 这一条，我接受 (accept) 所有的条款。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They eat a lot, but they eat some of the tiniest animals in the ocean.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 那个微小的 (tiny) 贝壳在阳光下闪闪发亮 (shiny)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 精力充沛的；生机勃勃的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This food lasts for over a year and it helps to create a lively and healthy ecosystem.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 那个精力充沛的 (lively) 小朋友非常可爱 (lovely)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Blue whales live in all oceans except the Arctic Ocean.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 专有名词: Arctic (北极的) + Ocean (海洋) -> 北冰洋。
